basic_details.job_title: IIM Raipur Software Developer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Raipur (IIM Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Raipur (IIM Raipur) Software Developer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website for the recruitment of 1 Software Developer post. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Raipur Software Developer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation shall be applicable as per Government of India rules in force for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-Servicemen/EWS candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: BCA/B.Sc (Computer Science/IT), B.Tech/BE (CS/CE/IT), MCA, M.Sc (Computer Science/IT) with minimum 55% marks, Minimum 5 years post-qualification experience in software development from specified institutions
qualification.details: Qualification: BCA/B.Sc (Computer Science/IT), B.Tech (CS/CE/IT)/BE(CS/CE/IT), MCA or M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT) with minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade from a recognised University or Institute. Experience: Minimum five (05) years of post-qualification experience with expertise in software development from educational institutions such as IIMs, IITs, IIITs, NITs, IISc, AIIMS or institutions of comparable national standing.

salary_details.details: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 35,400/- Per Month.

selection_process: Shortlisting Written Test Skill Test Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Raipur Software Developer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Raipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Raipur Software Developer position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Software Developer post at IIM Raipur is 17th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Software Developer role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a BCA/B.Sc (Computer Science/IT), B.Tech/BE (CS/CE/IT), MCA, or M.Sc (Computer Science/IT) with a minimum of 55% marks.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are required for this position?
faq.answer: A minimum of five years of post-qualification experience in software development from specified institutions is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Software Developer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Software Developer position is 35 years, with applicable age relaxations as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Software Developer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 35,400/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Software Developer role at IIM Raipur?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Shortlisting, Written Test, Skill Test, and a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted in online mode only through the official IIM Raipur website.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Software Developer position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Software Developer position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIM Raipur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Raipur is located in Raipur, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 493661.
